channel.title: RISE 360 on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in RISE 360 on RaihnForge

item.title: Agile Project Plan: Kelvin Content Initiative
item.description:
Prepared for Kelvin Education, 300 Spectrum Dr., Irvine, CA 92618. ADMG 479 — Project Management Maturity, for Professor Dr. Laura Williamson. Drafted by Joshua Keyes, June 5, 2025.

1. Project-Specific Information

Kelvin Education is exploring, through research and development, the creation of content that complements the data gathering it does to assess and monitor student wellness. This utilizes the learning-loop method. The four steps are Feedback, Reflection, Learning, and Application (Hubkengroup, 2025). Kelvin’s survey platform constitutes the Feedback and Reflection portion of the loop. By developing content, the organization can incorporate Learning and Application to complete the learning loop.
